basic_details.job_title: BEML Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief General Manager, General Manager and More Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 51 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC-NCL, additional 10 years for PwD. Relaxation subject to excess PQE, maximum age not to exceed 57 years.

qualification.education_qualification: CA, CMA, MBA in Finance, Company Secretary
qualification.details: Chief General Manager (Gr. IX)-Finance: CA/ CMA/ two years Full-Time First-Class MBA in Finance (with Finance as core subject) from a recognised institution. General Manager (Gr. VIII)-Finance: CA/ CMA/ two years Full-Time First-Class MBA in Finance (with Finance as core subject) from a recognised institution. Deputy General Manager (Gr. VII)-Company Secretary: Qualified and Practicing Company Secretary with membership of the Institute of the Company Secretary of India. Desirable: Graduate Degree in Law or MBA.

salary_details.details: Chief General Manager (Gr. IX)-Finance: Rs.1,20,000 – 2,80,000 Per Month General Manager (Gr. VIII)-Finance: Rs.1,00,000 – 2,60,000 Per Month Deputy General Manager (Gr. VII)-Company Secretary: Rs.90,000 – 2,40,000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEML Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEML to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BEML Executives for Finance & Company Secretary posts is 26th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include CA, CMA, MBA in Finance, or being a Qualified Company Secretary, depending on the specific post applied for. Please refer to the detailed notification for exact requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for BEML recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 51 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this BEML recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Executives for Finance & Company Secretary in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 90,000 to Rs. 2,80,000 per month, with specific scales varying for each post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEML Executives posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Video Conference Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official BEML website.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Karnataka apply for this job?
faq.answer: The job location is Bangalore, Karnataka. While the notification doesn't explicitly restrict applications based on domicile, candidates should be prepared to relocate if selected.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these BEML positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Full Time.
